---
title: "Angeline Dahl's CV"
author: Angeline Dahl
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ['css/styles.css', 'resume']
    # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    self_contained: true
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  results='asis', 
  echo = FALSE
)

library(glue)
library(tidyverse)

# Set this to true to have links turned into footnotes at the end of the document
PDF_EXPORT <- FALSE

# Holds all the links that were inserted for placement at the end
links <- c()


# Load csv with position info
position_data <- read_csv('positions.csv')
```


```{r}
# When in export mode the little dots are unaligned, so fix that. 
if(PDF_EXPORT){
  cat("
  <style>
  :root{
    --decorator-outer-offset-left: -6.5px;
  }
  </style>")
}
```


Aside
================================================================================

![logo](beta_dist.png){width=100%}

```{r}
# When in export mode the little dots are unaligned, so fix that. 
if(PDF_EXPORT){
  cat("View this CV online with links at _nickstrayer.me/cv_")
} else {
  cat("[<i class='fas fa-download'></i> Download a PDF of this CV](https://github.com/nstrayer/cv/raw/master/strayer_cv.pdf)")
}
```


Contact {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> angelinenahjelar@gmail.com
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> github.com/AngelineDahl
- <i class="fa fa-link"></i> https://github.com/AngelineDahl/cv
- <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> (952) 380-8144



Main
================================================================================

ANGELINE DAHL 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Biomedical Assembler @ Medtronic | Python, SQL, Cognos Analytics, IBM Certified Data Analyst | MS Student | Banking Operations 

## About Me

Data Analyst with hands-on training in Python, pandas, SQL, and Cognos, specializing in data integrity, operational reliability, and process improvement. Over 10 years in banking operations and 3 years in regulated biomedical production, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and continuity of mission critical workflows. Currently pursuing an MS in Program Evaluation & Data Analytics at Arizona State University. Holds dual Bachelor’s degrees in Business Management and Organizational Leadership, with a focus on Project Management. Business acumen validated by a top 70% score on Peregrine Global’s nationally exam. Proud member of the National Society of Leadership and Success (NSLS), demonstrating commitment to leadership development and professional excellence. Known for analytical problem solving, pattern detection, and supporting stable, production critical systems.

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MASTER of SCIENCE (MS) in Program Evaluation and Data Analytics (In Progress)  
Arizona State University, Tempe, AZ, US
Expected graduation 2027


Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) magna cum laude  in Organizational Leadership (Project Management) 
Completed With Cumulative GPA of 3.69 
Arizona State University, Tempe, AZ, US. 
May 2025 


Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) in Business Management
Amity University, Noida India. 
Nov. 2018



Industry Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

##Certifications and PROFESSIONAL Experience

IBM Data Analyst Professional Certificate
IBM via Coursera  
October 2025

    • Integrated Excel, SQL, and Python to analyze datasets and build a Cognos dashboard.

Bank Operations Support Staff Member
Union Bank of Cameroon PLC
Yaounde, Center Region 
September 2009 - February 2021

    • Ensured accuracy, completeness, and compliance across high volume financial transactions.
    • Detected anomalies, resolved discrepancies, and maintained integrity of mission critical data flows.
    • Proposed data driven process improvements that reduced errors and improved workflow efficiency.
    • Recognized with multiple awards for reliability, accuracy, and service excellence.
    • Certificate of Achievement - Fraud Awareness, Professional Secrecy, Anti‑Money Laundering

Biomedical Assembler II
Medtronic
Brooklyn Center, MINNESOTA
February 2022 - Present

    • Support production critical operations in a regulated environment, ensuring continuity, accuracy, and compliance.
    • Maintain quality control logs and analyze production metrics to detect patterns and prevent workflow failures.
    • Troubleshoot issues and collaborate cross functionally to improve reliability and efficiency.
    • Operate within strict technical protocols, contributing to stable, high quality output across production lines.



Skills {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------
TECHNICAL SKILLS

    • Programming & Analytics: Python, pandas, NumPy, SQL, R, Excel
    • Data Operations: Data validation, dataset onboarding, ETL support, anomaly detection
    • Tools: Cognos Analytics, Jupyter, RStudio, Git, version control
    • Methods: Exploratory data analysis, applied statistics, mixed methods evaluation
    • Systems: Experience in regulated technical environments; command line familiarity

ADDITIONAL SKILLS & RECOGNITION

    • Mixed methods evaluation design, Theory of change modeling, Survey design
    • Data visualization and cartogram mapping in R, Reproducible workflows
    • Awards: NSLS Member, Silver Medal Award,  Best Western Union Agent (2011)

Languages: English (Fluent), French (Intermediate)
